calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288
Petitioner Xiong Chang Zhai aka Xiong Cheng Chen present in pro per for self and with Xingai Yao (father & mother), present in pro per, both as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Victor Zhai, and with Cantonese Interpreter Stella Li.
Petitioner and Interpreter were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Xiong Cheng Chen and Change Name of the Minor to: Victor Wenjun Chen.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
